projectDescription: A web-based tool for creating custom Star Wars-style opening crawl videos with personalized text and various resolution options.
keyFeatures: Custom Star Wars-style opening crawl video generation
Fully customizable text fields including title, episode, and crawl content
Professional Star Wars aesthetic with authentic styling
publicApiSurface: Web form with Start Text field
Web form with Title Row 1 field
Web form with Title Row 2 field
Web form with Episode Title field
Web form with Crawl Heading field
Web form with Crawl Text field
Web form with Email Address field
Web form with Resolution selector (SD, HD, 4K)
